title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Tata Communications

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Tata Communications
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Tata Communications. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Kanpur-based team.

About Tata Communications:
Tata Communications is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Communications!
jsonLd.skills: MongoDB, AWS, Java, Go, TypeScript, Microservices, REST APIs, Node.js
